description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is clad in white horizontal siding, with large rectangular windows framed in wood, providing ample natural light. A rooftop pool is visible, adding a luxurious touch to the design. The house features a spacious wooden deck shaded by several mature trees, creating a comfortable outdoor living area. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is set back beneath the trees, offering privacy and shade. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor space.
description: A modern, white rectangular house with a flat roof, rooftop pool, large windows, and a shaded wooden deck surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white siding, two rectangular windows, and the edge of the rooftop pool; trees and deck are partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, full wooden deck, and several large trees providing shade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear view of the rooftop pool, a single window, and the deck area extending from the house.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat roof with the pool, three windows, and the tops of the trees lining the deck.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry beneath trees, simple door, no visible steps, integrated with wooden deck, minimal ornamentation
